cycles.title: Project bootstrap with config and hooks
cycles.scene: Rex sets up the project infrastructure: config file, git hooks, and initial CI pipeline.

actions.content:
CI Pipeline Configuration
=========================
Trigger: push to main, PR to main
Matrix: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
Steps:
  1. Checkout
  2. Setup toolchain
  3. Cache dependencies
  4. Lint (clippy)
  5. Test (all crates)
  6. Build release
  7. Upload artifacts

Deploy trigger: tag v*
Deploy target: staging (auto), production (manual approval)

cycles.title: Monitoring setup with reservation enforcement
cycles.scene: Rex builds monitoring while Sam starts writing docs. Hook check verifies reservation enforcement.

actions.content:
Alerting Rules
==============
CRITICAL (PagerDuty):
  - error_rate > 5% for 5min
  - p99_latency > 2s for 10min
  - service_down for 1min

WARNING (Slack):
  - error_rate > 1% for 15min
  - p99_latency > 1s for 30min
  - disk_usage > 80%
  - memory_usage > 90%

INFO (Dashboard only):
  - deploy completed
  - config change detected
  - new service registered

cycles.title: Runbook authoring with cross-references
cycles.scene: Sam writes the production runbook, reading Rex's monitoring config for accuracy.

actions.content:
Incident Response Runbook
=========================

1. ACKNOWLEDGE (< 5min)
   - Ack PagerDuty alert
   - Join #incident Slack channel
   - Announce: "Investigating [alert name]"

2. TRIAGE (< 15min)
   - Check Grafana dashboard for affected service
   - Check error logs: kubectl logs -f deployment/[service]
   - Determine severity: S1 (customer-facing) / S2 (degraded) / S3 (internal)

3. MITIGATE (< 30min)
   - If deploy-related: rollback via CI (see ci.txt)
   - If load-related: scale horizontally
   - If data-related: enable circuit breaker

4. RESOLVE
   - Verify metrics return to baseline
   - Update status page
   - Schedule post-mortem within 48h

5. POST-MORTEM
   - Blameless RCA
   - Capture lessons in filament: fl lesson add
   - Update runbook if gap found

actions.body: Runbook written to docs/runbooks/incident-response.txt. References your alerting thresholds. Please review the rollback procedure section.

cycles.title: Governance audit — full infrastructure verification
cycles.scene: Rex runs the governance audit: graph analytics, audit trail, config verification, and export/import round-trip.
